scope: Cycle 9: Bug hunt C8 (encounter_card_overlay, screen_dither_layer) + CRT field hints feature

bugs_found.description: minigame.start() never called — was claimed fixed in C8 (BUG-022) but code was never pushed to GitHub.
set_color_levels() always sets 'color_levels' param — PSX shader uses 'color_depth'.
bugs_found.fix: Route param name based on _render_mode: PSX->color_depth, CRT->color_levels

bugs_found.description: EndRunScreen.tscn loaded scripts/ui/end_run_screen.gd (class EndRunScreenUI with wrong signals return_to_hub/faction_chosen) instead of scripts/run/end_run_screen.gd (class EndRunScreen with correct signals hub_requested/faction_ending_chosen). GameFlowController could never wire end screen properly.
bugs_found.fix: Updated .tscn to reference scripts/run/end_run_screen.gd. Changed node type Node->Control with full-rect anchors. Removed dead EndRunScreenUI file.

overall_assessment: Cycle 10: Bug hunt C10 clean. BUG-026 found during feature work — EndRunScreen scene/class mismatch. CRTNotify toast system added. 26 total bugs fixed across 10 cycles.
